agricultureHero.label: Sustainable Agriculture
agricultureHero.heading: Cultivating Growth in Harmony With the Land.
agricultureHero.subheading: Afari Trails supports agricultural initiatives that balance sustainability, community development, environmental stewardship, and long-term resilience.
agricultureHero.imageAlt: Golden fields at sunrise across African farmland

agricultureApproach.label: Our Approach
agricultureApproach.statement: We believe agriculture should nourish communities, protect ecosystems, and create sustainable opportunities for future generations.
themes: Regenerative systems that restore soil and biodiversity

agricultureFocusAreas.label: Key Focus Areas
agricultureFocusAreas.heading: Where land, people, and future meet.

items.title: Regenerative Farming
items.description: Practices that restore soil health, biodiversity, and the living rhythm of the land.

items.title: Water Stewardship
items.description: Responsible irrigation and protection of rivers, wetlands, and shared water sources.

items.title: Community Partnerships
items.description: Working alongside local farmers and communities as leaders — not recipients.

items.title: Food Security
items.description: Supporting resilient, sustainable food systems built for changing seasons and futures.

items.title: Sustainable Livestock
items.description: Ethical, environmentally balanced systems that coexist with wild landscapes.

items.title: Agricultural Innovation
items.description: Modern efficiency shaped by tradition, local expertise, and ecological intelligence.

agricultureLand.label: Land & Environment
agricultureLand.body: Agriculture and wilderness are not opposites when guided by balance. We support systems that preserve natural resources, protect wildlife corridors, and honor the coexistence between cultivation and the wild — because the future of food depends on the future of ecosystems.
agricultureLand.imageAlt: Hands holding rich soil in warm light

agricultureCommunity.label: Community Impact
agricultureCommunity.heading: Partners on the land.
agricultureCommunity.body: Local employment, farmer partnerships, skills development, and long-term opportunity — including women-led agriculture and youth initiatives. Communities are partners and leaders in every vision we pursue, shaping how land is tended and how harvests are shared.
agricultureCommunity.imageAlt: Farmers walking through crops at golden hour

agricultureInitiatives.label: Future Initiatives
agricultureInitiatives.heading: Seeds of what comes next.
agricultureInitiatives.intro: Visionary directions we are building toward — connected to hospitality, exploration, and place.

agricultureGallery.alt: Crops moving in wind at sunrise

agriculturePartners.label: Partnerships
agriculturePartners.heading: Growing alliances.
agriculturePartners.body: Afari Trails seeks collaborative partnerships that support resilient agricultural systems and sustainable long-term development across Africa.

agricultureEcosystem.label: The Afari Ecosystem
agricultureEcosystem.heading: One vision. Many connected paths.
agricultureEcosystem.body: Sustainable agriculture forms part of a wider vision connecting hospitality, conservation, community development, and responsible exploration — from eco lodge dining to field experiences and long-term land stewardship.

agricultureClosing.quote: The future grows from how we care for the land today.
